name_en: 🌹🌹🌹 New Color-Block Kelly Bag🎉, MCM Leather Kelly Bag 👜 Featuring Visetos print coated canvas paired with exquisite cowhide, making the classic MCM style shine with dazzling brilliance. Detachable shoulder strap, iconic turnlock closure, and a compact interior design lined with faux suede fabric, all adding the finishing touches. Whether in styling, structure, or style, it exudes timeless fashion [Strong] Size: 18.5×9.5×14.5cm
